solution: 
```cpp
class Solution {
public:
    int countEven(int num) {
        int count = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i <= num; ++i) {
            int sum = 0;
            int n = i;
            while (n > 0) {
                sum += n % 10;
                n /= 10;
            }
            if (sum % 2 == 0) {
                ++count;
            }
        }
        return count;
    }
};
```
efficiency: MEDIUM
time complexity: O(N * D), where N is num and D is the average number of digits in numbers up to num
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iterates through all numbers from 1 to num, calculates the digit sum for each, and checks if it is even. It is efficient for small constraints (up to 1000) but not optimal for large inputs due to the nested digit sum calculation.
